ToolTreaux Heavy Duty Battery Set Alkaline Batteries AA or AAA (Many Pack Sizes)

The ToolTreaux high-performance batteries are ideal for powering various electronic devices like flashlights, remotes, radios, and other household necessities. They are designed to deliver the correct amount of power to these devices and ensure optimal efficiency.

Key Features

  • HIGH-PERFORMANCE BATTERIES - The ToolTreaux batteries are ideal for powering common electronic devices like remote controls, flashlights, radios, and other household items. They will deliver the correct amount of power to devices that require batteries while providing optimal efficiency.
  • MERCURY AND CADMIUM FREE - These batteries are both mercury and cadmium free so you can use their safety in your household electronics. They have a longer service life than other generic batteries and are great for keyboards, mice, alarm clocks, and toys.
  • SHRINK-WRAPPED FOR STORAGE - Each set of 3 or 4 batteries comes shrink-wrapped so you can use them immediately or store them safely until needed. Keep them around the house or in your emergency kit to power radios, flashlights, and other power outage devices.
  • NOT RECHARGEABLE - Please note that these batteries are single-use only and not rechargeable. Do not expose them to fire, use them with other battery types or disassemble them. They can explode or leak if used improperly.
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Shrink-wrapped; Pack size: 3 or 4; Mercury and cadmium free; Single use batteries (non-rechargeable)

Compact in size, these batteries are great for keeping on hand in case of an emergency. Our batteries come shrink-wrapped and can be used immediately as needed or stored for later. Keep them around the house or in your emergency kit to power flashlights, radios, and other power outage must-haves.

The heavy-duty batteries are made with high-quality cadmium-free and mercury-free materials that you can use safely in your household devices, and they have a longer service life than other generic batteries. In addition to powering emergency devices, use them for other common electronics like keyboards, alarm clocks, toys, and more.

Please do not recharge these batteries, expose them to fire, disassemble them or mix them with other battery types. They can explode or leak if used improperly.
